title: IRONTHREAD Base Findings Schema
$comment: Documents the shared fields present in all findings schemas (SOVA_REPORT, WEBDIG_FINDINGS, NOIRE_FINDINGS). Not used for direct validation — this is a reference document. Each schema duplicates these definitions because JSON Schema 2020-12 $ref composition adds complexity without benefit for our use case.
description: Shared field definitions used across all IRONTHREAD agent output schemas.

meta.$comment: Present in: SOVA_REPORT, WEBDIG_FINDINGS, NOIRE_FINDINGS. Always required.

status.description: Whether the agent completed its full checklist

anomalies.$comment: Present in: SOVA_REPORT, WEBDIG_FINDINGS, NOIRE_FINDINGS. Optional in SOVA.

location.description: Where it was found (port, URL, path, etc.)

significance.description: Why it matters for the operation

tools_executed.$comment: Present in: SOVA_REPORT, WEBDIG_FINDINGS, NOIRE_FINDINGS. Always required.

tool.description: MCP tool name that was called

output_file.description: Path to raw output file in shared/raw/
